case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. CATHERINE THOM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $726.50 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT THOM, CATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PER CCSF REPRESENTATIVE CHARLES SMITH, THE DEFENDANT HAS PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
